title.en: A Chinese Convert's Story: From Beijing to the Beit Din
title.zh: 一个中国人的皈依故事:从北京到宗教法庭
title.he: סיפור גיור סיני: מבייג'ינג לבית הדין

description.en: The inspiring journey of Li Wei/Devorah Leah, a Chinese engineer who converted to Orthodox Judaism. Her story explores the cultural parallels between Chinese and Jewish traditions, the challenges of converting from a non-Western background, and the spiritual transformation from Beijing to the beit din.
description.zh: 李薇/德沃拉·莉娅的鼓舞人心的旅程,一位皈依正统犹太教的中国工程师。她的故事探讨了中国和犹太传统之间的文化相似性,从非西方背景皈依的挑战,以及从北京到宗教法庭的精神转变。
description.he: המסע המעורר השראה של לי ווי/דבורה לאה, מהנדסת סינית שהתגיירה ליהדות אורתודוכסית. סיפורה חוקר את הדמיון התרבותי בין מסורות סיניות ויהודיות, את האתגרים של גיור מרקע לא-מערבי, ואת השינוי הרוחני מבייג'ינג לבית הדין.

targetAudience: Prospective converts, especially from Asian and non-Western backgrounds; Chinese speakers considering conversion; Jews-by-choice looking for relatable stories
culturalParallels: Confucian filial piety (孝, xiào) and honoring parents
Chinese classical scholarship and Talmudic study methods
Mandate of Heaven (天命, tiānmìng) and accepting God's will
Yuánfèn (缘分) - destiny that brings people together

chineseTerms.meaning: choose what is good and hold fast to it

sources.title: To Be a Jew
sources.author: Rabbi Hayim Halevy Donin
sources.relevance: Mentioned as study resource for converts

sources.title: Jewish Literacy
sources.author: Rabbi Joseph Telushkin
sources.relevance: Mentioned as study resource for converts

sources.title: Pirkei Avot
sources.quote: You are not obligated to complete the work, but neither are you free to desist from it
sources.relevance: Quoted regarding commitment to conversion journey

sources.title: Conversion Process
sources.relevance: Orthodox conversion requirements, beit din, mikvah, choosing Hebrew name

practicalApplication: Guidance for prospective converts, especially from Asian backgrounds; understanding the conversion journey; appreciating cultural parallels
unique: First comprehensive narrative about a Chinese convert's journey with authentic cultural details and Confucian parallels
